to me what to me one of the greatest aspects of 
tendulkar's cricket it's been a wonderful journey

to have seen him from the time he was 14 15 years 
old it's just been the enormous dignity with which

he's carried himself then look at the master of 
the game make no mistake about it he's always

looked upon the game as a servant it's a lot 
of people in india i remember anjali asking

me why is why is all this happening why are all

who wanted to look up to someone with hope in

after the horrors of the second world war i

and often said in difficult times when

because much like in the movies allowed india to

for a while and glory in the fact that an indian 
could be the best in the world at what he did

and i think 91 92 when india were coming out of 
troubled economic times and we're starting to

find their place in the world just realizing that 
they could be as good as anybody else in the world

i think tendukar was was a symbol of what 
india could be ah there they go again

it was it was the second of april 2011 but 
there's a difference in the second of april

anywhere there just stayed in the background now

i think it was without kohli's lines that day

a lot of you might be watching this telecast

he's coming down now underneath where we are

everyone's going to think 
back to all those moments

where were you when sachin got his first hundred 
where were you when tenduka played his last test

he's shown what great strength he has had and

he didn't indicate there was a stars he

stood through to me and it should 
stand through to every cricketer

from here and i think you'll find bish that when

there'll be another tembook or we want to come and

i think that's the way he grew up enjoying

want to look at a little part of india it's a 
tribute to the culture that existed in the city

when tendulkar was growing up everything was laid 
out for him as a 14 year old the city was a buzz

with excitement and while other cities have

can take a great deal of credit the development of

unknown groundsmen just people looking after him

looked after him it was almost as if tenduka was

old everyone just looked after him i remember 
people from that era and mumbai cricket i've

spoken to and they just said we had to look after 
this man and i think everybody in indian cricket

in mumbai cricket has looked after him so i think 
it's fitting i think it's a wonderful gesture to

let him do this in front of his own crowd it's 
a no-brainer it always it had to be here the

suggestion that mumbai is a matchbox it isn't 
we've seen that today at the vancadis stadium

there'll be a lot of people with 
their own tenuka story to tell my

all by himself i think he's 
going to that one place

that always gave him calm and 
serenity it was the one place
it's one place that was always his own

humility is the word that comes 
to mind to be honest it doesn't

surprise me at all it has gone back 
to the 22 yards that so defined him

22 yards after the making of him and the

who looked like that just those 22 yards that

it will sit quietly in there i
